title: Documentation Improvement Roadmap Tasks
principles: Make current implementation distinct from planned architecture.
Keep root AGENTS.md short and route deeper instead of duplicating docs.
Use package root READMEs for package-local scope and guardrails.
Treat docs/repo-status-outline.html as a snapshot, not source of truth.

globalVerification.commitPolicy: Commit only after the coherent documentation slice passes verification.
requiredBeforeFinalPR: Audit README and AGENTS links against files that exist
Audit planned package references for clear planned/current wording

tasks.title: Fill README coverage for existing packages
tasks.goal: Document the package roots that already exist so local package ownership is clear.
outputs: Updated README coverage in documentation audit
mandatoryVerification: Each README includes scope, main areas, runtime shape, guardrails and related docs
Documentation audit no longer lists packages/http-api or packages/tsconfig as missing README coverage
completionCriteria: Existing package roots with package.json have package READMEs
No package README claims unimplemented calculation behavior exists

tasks.title: Refresh the root README
tasks.goal: Make README.md a useful human entrypoint without turning it into a manual.
outputs: Root README with current repo state, commands and docs entrypoints
Status snapshot linked or documented from README
mandatoryVerification: README links point at existing files
README distinguishes implemented surfaces from planned package families
browserVerification: Open docs/repo-status-outline.html locally if the snapshot is changed
completionCriteria: A new contributor can identify current app/API surfaces and next docs entrypoints from README.md
The HTML snapshot is explicitly described as a snapshot

tasks.title: Clarify current versus planned architecture docs
tasks.goal: Prevent planned package families from being mistaken for implemented code.
outputs: Current/planned wording pass across architecture docs
Consistent planned-package wording in near-term package READMEs
mandatoryVerification: Architecture docs identify current implemented surfaces
Planned packages are marked as planned where relevant
completionCriteria: No root or architecture doc routes users to a missing implementation as if it exists
Package ownership guidance remains forward-looking without hiding current gaps

tasks.title: Add docs maintenance guidance and final audit
tasks.goal: Define when future changes must update docs and verify the documentation set.
mandatoryVerification: Audit root atlas links against existing files
Audit docs for stale missing-README claims
completionCriteria: Docs maintenance rules are concise and tied to real ownership changes
Documentation audit records the next remaining priorities
